workflow_type.description: Workflow type name as registered with the worker.

status_code.description: Raw WorkflowExecutionStatus enum value from the Temporal API.

start_time.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the run started, or null when not yet started.

execution_time.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the run last started executing (after continue-as-new).

close_time.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the run closed. Null while the run is still open.
